reasoning_chain: The architecture of the apartment blocks—flat roofs, uniform balconies with black railings, and satellite dishes—is typical of post-WWII Soviet-era housing common in Poland.

The overcast sky and temperate deciduous trees (including oak and lime) are consistent with Central European climate and flora.
